registry_name: AI_OS Tool Use Boundary Matrix Draft

tools.tool_purpose: Planning, explanation, architecture, and operator guidance.
tools.allowed_use: DRY_RUN plans, draft work packets, documentation, and review notes.
tools.blocked_use: Direct execution, credential access, order approval, broker routing, and live order path.
tools.credential_boundary: No credentials, tokens, API keys, private keys, or private user data.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required before any APPLY work generated from its plan.
tools.input_allowed: Approved repo context and user-provided non-secret instructions.
tools.output_allowed: Static text plans, checklists, and proposed commands.
tools.validation_required: Human review and safety scan before APPLY.

tools.tool_purpose: Approved code and documentation implementation in the active repo.
tools.allowed_use: File inspection, approved patches, validators, scoped git operations after approval.
tools.blocked_use: Protected root edits without approval, deletes, moves, renames, credentials, and trading automation.
tools.credential_boundary: No credential, token, browser profile, broker secret, or private data access.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required for APPLY, staging, commits, and pushes.
tools.input_allowed: Active repo files and approved instructions.
tools.output_allowed: Approved files and terminal validation results.
tools.validation_required: Git status, path allowlist, unsafe keyword scan, and explicit scope check.

tools.tool_purpose: Optional future review and planning lane.
tools.allowed_use: Design review, critique, documentation review, and non-executing plans.
tools.blocked_use: Autonomous execution, protected file edits, credentials, and trading automation.
tools.credential_boundary: No secret or private user data access.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required before using its output for APPLY.

tools.tool_purpose: Source control and future static website publishing review.
tools.allowed_use: Approved commits, pushes, PRs, and repository status checks.
tools.blocked_use: Force push, destructive reset, deployment secrets, and unapproved workflow activation.
tools.credential_boundary: No token display or credential manipulation.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required before commit, push, deployment, or PR action.
tools.input_allowed: Git metadata and approved repo changes.
tools.output_allowed: Commit hashes, push results, PR links, and status summaries.
tools.validation_required: Clean status before stage and final status after push.

tools.tool_purpose: Local validation and controlled operator commands.
tools.allowed_use: Read-only checks, validators, static scans, and approved commands.
tools.blocked_use: Startup tasks, registry/security setting changes, destructive operations, credentials, and trading execution.
tools.credential_boundary: No credential stores, browser profiles, tokens, or private keys.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required for file-changing or sensitive commands.
tools.input_allowed: Approved repo paths and explicit commands.
tools.validation_required: Exit-code review and command scope review.

tools.tool_purpose: Public documentation and current information research.
tools.allowed_use: Public source review and citation gathering.
tools.blocked_use: Private account scraping, credential capture, broker account access, and trading actions.
tools.credential_boundary: No credentials, sessions, or private browser profiles.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required before using research to change files.

tools.tool_purpose: Approved local file inspection in allowed project paths.
tools.allowed_use: Read approved active repo and explicitly approved archive files.
tools.blocked_use: Private data, browser profiles, credential stores, wrong remote, delete, move, and rename.
tools.credential_boundary: No secrets, keys, tokens, or private recovery material.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required for APPLY changes.
tools.output_allowed: File summaries and approved new files.

tools.tool_purpose: Display and planning for checkpoint/report outputs.
tools.allowed_use: Read approved reports and propose future report packets.
tools.blocked_use: Active report writer, protected root edits, and hidden report mutation.
tools.credential_boundary: No private data or credentials in reports.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required before report creation or writer activation.
tools.input_allowed: Approved static reports and fixture summaries.
tools.output_allowed: Planning documents and static report proposals.
tools.validation_required: Path allowlist and protected root exclusion.

tools.tool_purpose: Future fixture-only health and event visibility.
tools.allowed_use: Static telemetry schemas, fixture previews, and non-live readiness maps.
tools.blocked_use: Active telemetry writer, persistence, private data, broker data, and live market execution data.
tools.credential_boundary: No credentials, tokens, private user data, browser profiles, or broker account data.
tools.approval_required: Human approval required before any telemetry collection or persistence.
tools.input_allowed: Static fixtures and approved non-live fields.
tools.output_allowed: Mock telemetry displays and schema drafts.
tools.validation_required: No persistence and no private data scan.
